props.message:
THE WILD HUM

A chaotic room. The floor pattern is different every visit. Wind from indeterminate directions.

Lirien's breath, the realm has rooms that just are like this. The Wyrdkin shrug and bring an extra cloak.

Carved into a stone you swear was somewhere else last time:

'The hum is the realm not knowing what it wants to be just now. Wait a breath. The hum will decide. By the Source, it always does.'

props.open_message: A piece of heart, half-buried in the shifting floor. The realm hummed it into being while you were looking the other way.

root.speaker: Urandom
root.text:
*she rummages in a bag of bone-dice and pulls one out at random*

A hint for you. From the well of unpredictable things. It is good enough for almost any use.

h1.speaker: Urandom
h1.text: "The thing you cannot reach is two paces lower than you think."

h2.speaker: Urandom
h2.text: "Hammers open doors that are not doors."

h3.speaker: Urandom
h3.text: "There is a chest behind something you walked past today."

h4.speaker: Urandom
h4.text: "Glim sees more in the dark. You should let him try."

h5.speaker: Urandom
h5.text: "When in doubt, hum the chord you know best."
